rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MURRAY NORTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Transfer Of Assets To Special Needs Trust
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) It is unclear how this Court can "confirm" petitioner as trustee (or the trust protector or the TAC) when valid appointment was never made. 2) It is unclear whether the subject special needs trust exists as no one executed the trust, the trust was never funded, and the beneficiary is now deceased. 3) It does not appear that the subject trust ever had an interest in the proceeds of the real property, as the order establishing the trust only directed that the proceeds be funded into the trust. 4) This petition, which deals with a subtrust of a testamentary trust established pursuant to final distribution order in around 1968, should have been filed in its own trust case number. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 9th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL STEPHEN SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/19/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Unless otherwise permitted for good cause, if an account exceeds two years, the first two years must be filed separately. [LRSF 14.35 A.] The post accounting transactions listed in paragraph 24 of the petition are not sufficiently detailed. What deductions were made from the gross amount of the death benefit check? Why was Mowat paid $2,900? What is SLS from which another check is expected? Is the Bank of America stock held in certificate form? No account statement was filed to confirm the number of shares, which also were not shown on the informational schedule (only the value of the dividends reinvested). What happened with the ancillary proceeding in Florida? Why is the estate here responsible for payments associated with that proceeding? The Assignment #1 signed by Michael Smith on 3/16/20 and by IFC on 3/17/20 was not filed until 5/26/20. [Probate Code Section 11604.5(d)(1).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 7/9/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES YEE CHIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: APPEARANCE FOR NO RESPONSE: If a hearing is continued for issues raised by an Examiner to be addressed and there is no response prior to the continued hearing date, the matter is automatically continued again, usually for one month. If there is still no response, an appearance is required. If no one appears after the automatic second continuance, the matter is ordinarily taken off calendar if it is not a compulsory petition, or an Order to Appear is issued. The Court to determine why the issues posted for the hearing on 4/5/21 have not yet been addressed. These multiple continuances are a waste of the Court's resources. Due to the COVID-19 emergency, counsel and parties must appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID CASTRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/21/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Neither the initial petition nor the supplement filed on 11/21/19 indicated who the decedent's father was and when he died. Notice was mailed to the DHCS and the FTB on 9/16/17? Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary has previously been confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc. The summary of account shown in paragraph 16 (although accounting was waived) does not balance. Subparagraph vi of paragraph 22.16 refers to proposed distribution in paragraph 30, but paragraph 30 discloses the nature of the estate property. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 7/12/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALEKSANDER ALEKSANDROVICH DONSKOY AKA ALEKSANDER ALEKSANDROVICH DONSKOY AKA DONSKOI ALEKSANDER ALEKSAND
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/2021. 1) On 04/16/2021 a Declaration signed by Petitioner alleges Decedent's name is Aleksander Aleksandrovich Donskoi and in some business dealings his last name was misspelled Donskoy. It appears an amended petition must be filed with Decedent's correct name with an aka and must be re-noticed and re-published. (CRC 7.53). After the amended petition is filed it appears an ex parte must be filed to correct the name of Decedent in the court system. 2) Answer to Objections must be signed and verified by Petitioner. [CRC 7.103]. 3) Examiner must receive a proposed order from petitioner on the mandatory judicial council form DE-140. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 4) Objector has not filed a competing petition for probate. Unclear why Objector provided a proposed order, not on the mandatory judicial council form DE-140, for appointing A Professional Fiduciary as administrator of Decedent's Testate Estate when no petition has been filed. 5) Attorney John Saadeh filed the Confidential statement several times as part of other documents that are not confidential but not separately and confidentially and must do so. Unclear if petitioner's attorney will be filing to remove the DE-147S from non-confidential filings. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 6) The Will allegedly bequeaths to Donskai Tatyanna Anatolievna unclear if Tatiana Anatolievna Donskaya is the same person. 7) The Will allegedly bequeaths to Donskoi Alexander Viktorovich unclear if Alexsandr Viktorovich Donskoy is the same person. 8) The Will allegedly bequeaths to Donskaia Evita Alexandovna unclear if Evita ALeskandrovna Donskaya is the same person. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/28/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JESSIE MAE RUSH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/2021. Prior notes haven't been addressed matter continued again. 1) The petition must be amended to request appointment of a person as personal representative not a law firm. An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53]. 2) Notice does not indicate Lost Will. Petitions for probate of lost wills must clearly state on their face that the will is lost and both the published and mailed notice must so state. [LRSF 14.20]. 3) Must file Duties and Liabilities of Personal Representative (DE-147). 4) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [LRSF 14.18 E.] 5) Please amend attachment 3f(3) as it must address the factors and presumption in Probate Code 6124. 6) Please provide legal authority for petitioner having priority as personal representative. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to the notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/28/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SOLEDAD B. TORDESILLAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Competing petitions for appointment have been filed by a nominee of a creditor and by Decedent's daughter. 2) Petitioner Wilhelmina Gabriel requests admission of a lost will. It appears that the will was last in Decedent's possession. A declaration from the drafting attorney is attached to the supplemental declaration filed on 5/21/21 opining that he does not believe that Decedent revoked her will. 3) The alternate named executors, who are also the contingent beneficiaries of Decedent's trust, Phillip Gabriel and Benjamin Gabriel, have not been given notice. "Acknowledgment" has been filed by both, which acknowledges receipt of the petition and consents to the petition by Wilhelmina Gabriel, but does not explicitly waive notice. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 9th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LIGONG HUANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/2021. 1) The total assets are alleged at $98,845.00. Please explain why this petition is necessary and please explain why this estate is not being brought under Probate Code 13000 et seq. 2) Petitioner mailed an unfiled copy of the Duties and Liabilities to Examiner which has been recycled. See LRSF 14.7. Must file a Duties and Liabilities that includes all information. 3) Must file proof of publication. 4) The petition page 3 #5.a. (3) or (4) must be selected. 5) The petition page 4 under #8 must include Shihan Li. 6) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [LRSF 14.18 E.] 7) Please explain why on page 2 under 3. g. petitioner selected (1)(c) and (2)(b) when the petition appears to be a petition for letters of administration. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/28/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
